meta.title: Singular Design System
meta.description: A multi-brand, scalable Design System for WalaPlus, WalaOne, and Doam products

hero.title: Design with clarity
hero.description: Ship beautiful, consistent interfaces across WalaPlus, WalaOne, and Doam using our scalable design tokens, flexible components, and powerful Flutter toolkit.

brands.title: One System, Three Brands
brands.description: Singular powers consistent experiences across our entire product ecosystem

features.title: Built for Scale
features.subtitle: Everything you need to build world-class products

tokens.title: Design Tokens
tokens.description: Single source of truth for colors, typography, spacing, and more. Semantic tokens that adapt to any brand or theme.

themes.title: Multi-Brand Themes
themes.description: Seamlessly switch between WalaPlus, WalaOne, and Doam with automatic token mapping.

modes.title: Light & Dark Modes
modes.description: Full support for light and dark themes across all brands with smooth transitions.

rtl.title: RTL Support
rtl.description: Native support for Arabic and other RTL languages with automatic layout mirroring.

flutter.title: Flutter First
flutter.description: Built with Flutter's ThemeExtension pattern for maximum flexibility and type safety.

docs.title: Living Documentation
docs.description: Interactive Widgetbook documentation with real-time previews and code examples.

colors.title: Colors
colors.description: 12-step color scales with semantic tokens for consistent visual language

typography.title: Typography
typography.description: Material 3 inspired type scale with automatic font switching for Arabic

spacing.title: Spacing
spacing.description: 4px base unit system for consistent rhythm and visual harmony

radius.title: Border Radius
radius.description: Flexible radius tokens from sharp corners to full circles

elevation.title: Elevation
elevation.description: 5 levels of shadow depth for visual hierarchy

icons.title: Icons
icons.description: Comprehensive icon library designed for clarity at any size

iconography.title: Iconography
iconography.description: 14 icon sizes from 12px to 150px with the Icon Resizer component

getStarted.title: Get Started
getStarted.subtitle: Join thousands of developers building with Singular

forDesigners.title: For Designers
forDesigners.description: Access Figma libraries, design guidelines, and brand assets

forDevelopers.title: For Developers
forDevelopers.description: Installation guides, API reference, and code examples

quickLinks.colorsDesc: Explore our color system with 12-step scales

usage.title: Basic Usage
usage.description: Access design tokens through context extensions

nextSteps.title: Next Steps
nextSteps.exploreDesc: Learn about all available tokens and components

codeExample.title: Simple to Use
codeExample.description: Access design tokens directly from BuildContext with type-safe extensions

quickNav.title: Explore the System
quickNav.subtitle: Everything you need to build beautiful, consistent interfaces

getStarted.title: Get Started
getStarted.description: Quick setup guide and installation instructions to get up and running

foundations.title: Foundations
foundations.description: Colors, typography, spacing, and other design tokens

components.title: Components
components.description: Ready-to-use UI components built with design tokens

patterns.title: Patterns
patterns.description: Common UI patterns and best practices for consistent experiences

footer.tagline: Crafted with care for WalaPlus, WalaOne, and Doam
footer.copyright: © 2026 Singular Design System. All rights reserved.

components.title: Components
components.description: beautifully designed, production-ready components to build your applications

callToActions.name: Call to Actions
callToActions.description: Interactive elements that prompt users to take action

navigation.name: Navigation
navigation.description: Components that help users move through the application

dataEntry.name: Data Entry
dataEntry.description: Form controls for collecting user input

dataDisplay.name: Data Display
dataDisplay.description: Components for presenting information to users

feedback.name: Feedback
feedback.description: Components that communicate status and provide feedback

colorPage.title: Colors
colorPage.description: Singular's color system is built on semantic tokens that adapt to brand and theme context. Every color has a purpose.
colorPage.primitivesDesc: Brand, neutral, and status color scales in 12-step ranges from 25 to 950
colorPage.semanticDesc: Contextual colors that adapt to theme and brand
colorPage.brandsDesc: Primary and secondary colors for each brand
colorPage.colorVariablesDesc: Color variables (Figma's version of design tokens) store reusable values that can be applied to all kinds of design properties including fill and stroke colors. They help save time and effort when managing design systems by acting as a "single source of truth" while allowing designers to create multiple color modes.

typographyPage.title: Typography
typographyPage.description: A comprehensive type system using Inter font for both English and Arabic with optimized sizing for each language.
typographyPage.textScaleNote: Text sizes may differ between English and Arabic for optimal readability
typographyPage.arabicSizeNote: Arabic Text/XL uses 24px instead of 20px for better readability in RTL layouts.

elevationPage.title: Shadows & Blurs
elevationPage.description: Elevation tokens create visual hierarchy through shadows and blur effects.

spacingPage.title: Spacing & Sizing
spacingPage.description: A consistent spacing system based on a 4px base unit for rhythm and visual harmony.
spacingPage.baseUnitDesc: All spacing values are multiples of 4px

radiusPage.title: Border Radius
radiusPage.description: Flexible radius tokens from sharp corners to full circles for consistent component styling.

gridPage.title: Grid & Layouts
gridPage.description: Responsive grid system for consistent layouts across all screen sizes.

overlaysPage.title: Overlays
overlaysPage.description: Overlay tokens for modals, drawers, and backdrop effects.
overlaysPage.glassMorphismDesc: Frosted glass effect for modern UI

systemUIPage.title: System UI
systemUIPage.description: Guidelines for integrating with native system UI elements.
systemUIPage.statusBarDesc: Adapt status bar style to match app theme
systemUIPage.safeAreasDesc: Respect device safe areas for notches and home indicators

foundationsPage.title: Foundations
foundationsPage.description: The core building blocks of the Singular Design System. These foundational elements ensure consistency across all products.

iconographyPage.title: Iconography
iconographyPage.description: A comprehensive icon library with 6 style variants and 14 predefined sizes for consistent icon usage across all products.
iconographyPage.iconResizerDesc: This is an internal Figma component used to enable changing icon size when nested inside another component. Use these size tokens to maintain consistency across your designs.
iconographyPage.sizingScaleDesc: 14 predefined sizes from micro icons to full-page heroes, designed for every use case.
iconographyPage.searchPlaceholder: Search icons by name or keyword...
iconographyPage.noIconsFound: No icons found matching your search.
iconographyPage.searchFlagsPlaceholder: Search flags by country name or code...
iconographyPage.noFlagsFound: No flags found matching your search.
iconographyPage.noSocialIconsFound: No social icons found matching your search.

guidelines.do1: Use predefined size tokens for consistency
guidelines.do2: Match icon size to surrounding text and UI elements
guidelines.do3: Use smaller sizes (12-20px) for inline icons
guidelines.do4: Use larger sizes (64px+) for hero sections and marketing
guidelines.dont1: Use arbitrary pixel values outside the scale
guidelines.dont2: Mix different icon sizes in the same context
guidelines.dont4: Use hero sizes for functional UI elements

buttonsPage.title: Buttons
buttonsPage.description: Buttons allow users to trigger actions with a single tap.

variants.title: Button Variants
variants.description: Four distinct button variants to establish visual hierarchy in your interface.

primary.title: Primary
primary.description: High emphasis for the main call to action. Use sparingly.

secondary.title: Secondary
secondary.description: Medium emphasis for secondary actions. Light brand-tinted background with brand-colored text.

tertiary.title: Tertiary
tertiary.description: Low emphasis for less prominent actions. Subtle hover state.

outline.title: Outline
outline.description: Medium emphasis with border. Good for secondary actions that need more visibility.

danger.title: Danger / Destructive
danger.description: Use danger variants for destructive actions like delete, remove, or cancel.

states.title: Button States
states.description: Buttons support Default, Hover, Focused, Disabled, and Loading states. Interactive states are applied automatically. Disabled buttons use a consistent gray style regardless of variant.
states.defaultDesc: The resting state of the button. Uses the base color tokens for each variant.
states.hoverDesc: Triggered on mouse hover. Primary darkens, Secondary intensifies, Tertiary/Outline gain background.
states.focusedDesc: Shows a focus ring when tabbed to (keyboard navigation). Uses brand color for the ring.
states.disabledDesc: All variants use the same disabled style: gray-100 background, gray-500 text, cursor not-allowed.
states.loadingDesc: Shows a spinner and disables interaction. Preserves the button's variant colors.

icons.title: Buttons with Icons
icons.description: Icons can be placed before or after the button text to provide additional context.

fullWidth.title: Full Width Buttons
fullWidth.description: Use full width buttons for mobile layouts or when the button should span the container.

iconButtonsPage.title: Icon Buttons
iconButtonsPage.description: Compact buttons that use icons for space-efficient actions.

variants.title: Icon Button Variants
variants.description: Four variants for different levels of visual emphasis.

primary.title: Primary
primary.description: High emphasis for primary icon actions.

tertiary.title: Tertiary
tertiary.description: Minimal style for toolbars and dense UIs.

danger.title: Danger / Destructive
danger.description: Use danger variants for destructive actions like delete or remove.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.description: Four sizes to fit different UI contexts.

states.title: Button States
states.description: Icon buttons support default, hover, focused, disabled, and loading states.
states.defaultDesc: The resting state of the icon button before any user interaction.
states.hoverDesc: Visual feedback when the cursor is over the icon button.
states.focusedDesc: Keyboard focus indicator with a visible ring around the icon button.
states.disabledDesc: Non-interactive state with reduced opacity and no pointer events.
states.loadingDesc: Shows a spinner while an async operation is in progress.

buttonGroupPage.title: Button Group
buttonGroupPage.description: Group related buttons together for cohesive action sets.

examples.title: Common Examples
examples.description: Button groups are commonly used for toolbars, segmented controls, and action sets.

orientation.title: Orientation
orientation.description: Button groups support horizontal and vertical layouts.
orientation.horizontalDesc: Default layout for inline actions and toolbars.
orientation.verticalDesc: Stacked layout for mobile or sidebar navigation.

attached.title: Attached
attached.description: Remove gaps between buttons and join them together for segmented controls like date pickers or view toggles.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.description: Use the size prop to apply consistent sizing to all buttons in the group.

gap.title: Gap Control
gap.description: Control the spacing between buttons when not attached.

variants.title: Button Variants in Groups
variants.description: Button groups support all button variants for different visual hierarchies.

primary.title: Primary
primary.description: High emphasis groups for primary actions.

tertiary.title: Tertiary
tertiary.description: Low emphasis for less prominent actions.

danger.title: Danger / Destructive Groups
danger.description: Button groups containing danger buttons for destructive actions like delete or remove.

states.title: Button States in Groups
states.description: Buttons within groups support all standard states including default, hover, focused, disabled, and loading.
states.defaultDesc: The resting state of buttons in the group before any user interaction.
states.hoverDesc: Visual feedback when the cursor is over a button in the group.
states.focusedDesc: Keyboard focus indicator with a visible ring around the focused button.
states.disabledDesc: Non-interactive state with reduced opacity for buttons in the group.
states.loadingDesc: Shows a spinner while an async operation is in progress.

withIconButtons.title: With Icon Buttons
withIconButtons.description: Button groups work seamlessly with IconButton components.

dockPage.title: Dock
dockPage.description: Buttons in a dock container to be fixed at the screen bottom.

variants.title: Dock Variants
variants.description: Different dock configurations matching Figma design variants.

inputFieldPage.title: Input Field
inputFieldPage.description: Text input fields allow users to enter and edit text with various types, states, and addons.

types.title: Input Types
types.description: Nine different input types to handle various data entry scenarios.

simple.title: Simple
simple.description: Basic text input with optional trailing icon.

leadingIcon.title: Leading Icon
leadingIcon.description: Input with a leading icon to clarify the expected content.

leadingDropdown.title: Leading Dropdown
leadingDropdown.description: Input with a leading dropdown for selection, like currency or unit.

trailingDropdown.title: Trailing Dropdown
trailingDropdown.description: Input with a trailing dropdown for additional options or categories.

trailingAction.title: Trailing Action
trailingAction.description: Input with a trailing action button, like copy or search.

phoneNumber.title: Phone Number
phoneNumber.description: Phone input with country code selector and flag.

leadingText.title: Leading Text
leadingText.description: Input with leading text prefix, like https:// for URLs.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Multi-select input displaying selected items as removable tags.

textarea.title: Text Area
textarea.description: Multi-line text input for longer content like descriptions.

states.title: Input States
states.description: Input fields support Default, Fill, Focus, and Disabled states.
states.focusHint: Click input to see focus state

danger.title: Danger / Error State
danger.description: Use danger state for validation errors with red border and error hint text.

chip.title: Chip Component
chip.description: Chips are used to display selected items in tags/multi-select inputs.

listControlPage.title: List Control
listControlPage.description: Selection controls for checkboxes, radios, and toggles with optional titles and descriptions.

types.title: Control Types
types.description: Three control types for different selection scenarios.

checkbox.title: Checkbox
checkbox.description: Square control for multi-select options. Users can select multiple items.

radio.title: Radio
radio.description: Circular control for single-select options. Only one can be selected in a group.

toggle.title: Toggle
toggle.description: Switch control for on/off states. Best for immediate actions.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.description: Two size variants available for different use cases.

variants.title: Style Variants
variants.description: Two visual styles for different contexts.

fullWidth.title: Full Width
fullWidth.description: Inline layout without borders, suitable for lists and forms.

widget.title: Widget
widget.description: Bordered container style, suitable for standalone options or cards.

states.title: States
states.description: Controls support Default, Selected, Hover, Focus, and Disabled states.

content.title: Content Options
content.description: Controls can display title, description, or both.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: ListControl includes full keyboard navigation and ARIA attributes for screen readers.

labels.title: Title
labels.darkModeDesc: Switch between light and dark themes
labels.agreeTermsDesc: I accept the terms and conditions
labels.rememberMeDesc: Stay logged in on this device

dropdownPage.title: Dropdown
dropdownPage.description: Dropdown components allow users to select options from a menu. Includes DropdownMenu for standalone menus and InputDropdown for form inputs.

dropdownMenu.title: Dropdown Menu
dropdownMenu.description: A floating menu list that displays selectable options with hover and selected states.

inputDropdown.title: Input Dropdown
inputDropdown.description: A form input that opens a dropdown menu for single-select scenarios.
inputDropdown.label: Select Option
inputDropdown.hint: Helper text appears below the input

states.title: Input States
states.description: InputDropdown supports Enabled, Focused, Open, and Display states.
states.description_enabled: Default interactive state, ready for user click
states.description_focused: Border changes to brand color, no dropdown visible
states.description_open: Dropdown menu appears below with brand border
states.description_display: Shows selected value in read-only format

leading.title: Leading Variants
leading.description: InputDropdown supports different leading elements: None, Icon, Image, or Avatar.

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.description: Standard size with 48px height for consistency with other inputs.

features.title: Features
features.description: Key features of the dropdown components.
features.rtlDesc: Automatic layout mirroring for Arabic and other RTL languages
features.keyboardDesc: Full keyboard support with Enter, Space, Arrow keys, and Escape
features.elevationDesc: Floating menu with proper shadow for visual hierarchy
features.statesDesc: Hover, focus, and selected states with smooth transitions

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Both components include full ARIA attributes and keyboard navigation.

tabBarPage.title: Tab Bar
tabBarPage.description: Bottom navigation component for mobile apps. Supports 4-5 tabs, optional iOS home indicator, and floating action button (FAB).

basicUsage.title: Basic Usage
basicUsage.description: Tab Bar displays navigation items at the bottom of the screen with icon and label.
basicUsage.fourItemsDesc: Standard tab bar with 4 evenly distributed items
basicUsage.withIndicatorDesc: iOS-style home indicator for devices without physical home button
basicUsage.withFabDesc: Floating action button overlays the center of the tab bar
basicUsage.fiveItemsDesc: Tab bar can accommodate up to 5 items
basicUsage.allFeaturesDesc: Tab bar with home indicator and FAB together

props.items: Array of tab items with icon and label
props.selectedIndex: Index of the currently selected tab (0-based)
props.onTabChange: Callback fired when a tab is clicked
props.showIndicator: Display iOS home indicator below tabs
props.showFab: Display floating action button in center
props.fabIcon: Icon to display in the FAB button
props.onFabClick: Callback fired when FAB is clicked
props.position: Positioning mode: 'fixed' for bottom-fixed, 'demo' for documentation

types.tabBarItem: Tab item object with icon (ReactNode) and label (string)

dos.text: Use 4-5 tabs for optimal mobile navigation
dos.textAr: استخدم 4-5 علامات تبويب للتنقل الأمثل في الهاتف المحمول

dos.text: Keep labels short and descriptive (1-2 words)
dos.textAr: اجعل التسميات قصيرة ووصفية (1-2 كلمة)

dos.text: Use recognizable icons that match their labels
dos.textAr: استخدم أيقونات مميزة تتطابق مع تسمياتها

dos.text: Highlight the current tab with brand color
dos.textAr: ميز علامة التبويب الحالية بلون العلامة التجارية

donts.text: Don't use more than 5 tabs
donts.textAr: لا تستخدم أكثر من 5 علامات تبويب

donts.text: Don't use long text that wraps to multiple lines
donts.textAr: لا تستخدم نصوصًا طويلة تمتد لأكثر من سطر

donts.text: Don't change tab order based on selection
donts.textAr: لا تغير ترتيب علامات التبويب بناءً على الاختيار

donts.text: Don't hide the tab bar when scrolling
donts.textAr: لا تخفي شريط علامات التبويب عند التمرير

sectionHeaderPage.title: Section Header
sectionHeaderPage.description: Section headers display section titles with optional supporting text, icons, and trailing actions. Comes in four different sizes.

sizeVariants.title: Size Variants
sizeVariants.description: Section Header comes in four different sizes to fit various display contexts.

optionalElements.title: Optional Elements
optionalElements.description: Icons and trailing actions can be added as needed.

props.title: Main title text displayed in the header
props.supportingText: Supporting description text below the title
props.size: Size variant: xl (24px), lg (20px), md (16px), sm (14px)
props.leadingIcon: Leading icon component displayed before the title
props.showHelpIcon: Show help icon after the title
props.onTrailingActionClick: Callback when trailing action is clicked

dos.text: Use X-Large size for main page section headers
dos.textAr: استخدم الحجم الكبير جداً لرؤوس أقسام الصفحة الرئيسية

dos.text: Use Large size for sub-section headers
dos.textAr: استخدم الحجم الكبير لرؤوس الأقسام الفرعية

dos.text: Use Medium/Small sizes for compact UI areas
dos.textAr: استخدم الأحجام المتوسطة/الصغيرة للمناطق المدمجة

dos.text: Add supporting text for additional context
dos.textAr: أضف نص داعم لمزيد من السياق

dos.text: Use trailing action for 'See All' or 'View More' links
dos.textAr: استخدم الإجراء الثانوي لروابط 'عرض الكل' أو 'المزيد'

donts.text: Don't use multiple trailing actions together
donts.textAr: لا تستخدم إجراءات ثانوية متعددة معاً

donts.text: Don't overcrowd with too many elements
donts.textAr: لا تكدس بالكثير من العناصر

donts.text: Don't use small size for main page headers
donts.textAr: لا تستخدم الحجم الصغير لرؤوس الصفحات الرئيسية

donts.text: Don't hide important navigation in trailing icons
donts.textAr: لا تخفِ التنقل المهم في الأيقونات الثانوية

actionHeaderPage.title: Action Header
actionHeaderPage.description: A horizontal toolbar with composable left content and fixed action buttons on the right.

examples.title: Examples
examples.description: Action Header is flexible and can be used with different types of content.

props.children: Left content slot for tabs, navigation, or custom content
props.dropdownLabel: Label text for the dropdown button
props.dropdownIcon: Custom icon for dropdown button (default: ArrowDown2)
props.onDropdownClick: Callback when dropdown button is clicked
props.actionLabel: Label text for the primary action button
props.actionIcon: Icon for the action button (displayed before label)
props.onActionClick: Callback when action button is clicked

dos.text: Use for dashboard headers with filters and actions
dos.textAr: استخدم لرؤوس لوحة التحكم مع المرشحات والإجراءات

dos.text: Combine with Tabs component for navigation
dos.textAr: ادمج مع مكون التبويبات للتنقل

dos.text: Use clear, action-oriented labels for buttons
dos.textAr: استخدم تسميات واضحة وموجهة للإجراء للأزرار

dos.text: Include icons for better visual recognition
dos.textAr: أضف أيقونات للتعرف البصري الأفضل

donts.text: Don't overload with too many tabs
donts.textAr: لا تفرط في استخدام عدد كبير من التبويبات

donts.text: Don't use vague labels like 'Click Here'
donts.textAr: لا تستخدم تسميات غامضة مثل 'انقر هنا'

donts.text: Don't hide the primary action button
donts.textAr: لا تخفِ زر الإجراء الرئيسي

donts.text: Don't use on narrow mobile screens without adapting
donts.textAr: لا تستخدم على شاشات الجوال الضيقة بدون تكييف

pageHeaderPage.title: Page Header
pageHeaderPage.description: A page header component with breadcrumbs, title, description, actions, search, and tabs. Supports responsive layout for mobile and desktop.

items.title: Project Settings
items.supportingText: Manage your project settings and preferences

examples.title: Examples
examples.description: Page Header is flexible and can be customized for various use cases.

props.title: Page title text
props.breadcrumbs: Array of breadcrumb items for navigation
props.tag: Tag text to display beside the title
props.leadingImage: URL for the leading image (when leading='image')
props.leadingImageAlt: Alt text for the leading image

dos.text: Use breadcrumbs for navigation context
dos.textAr: استخدم فتات الخبز لسياق التنقل

dos.text: Place primary actions on the right side
dos.textAr: ضع الإجراءات الرئيسية على الجانب الأيمن

dos.text: Use supporting text for page description
dos.textAr: استخدم النص الداعم لوصف الصفحة

dos.text: Use tags for status or categories
dos.textAr: استخدم الوسوم للحالة أو الفئات

dos.text: Adapt layout for mobile using breakpoint prop
dos.textAr: كيّف التخطيط للجوال باستخدام خاصية نقطة القطع

donts.text: Don't use overly long titles
donts.textAr: لا تستخدم عناوين طويلة جدًا

donts.text: Don't add too many action buttons
donts.textAr: لا تضف الكثير من أزرار الإجراءات

donts.text: Don't hide important navigation breadcrumbs
donts.textAr: لا تخفِ فتات الخبز المهمة للتنقل

donts.text: Don't use search without a clear purpose
donts.textAr: لا تستخدم البحث بدون هدف واضح

stepperPage.title: Stepper
stepperPage.description: Steppers display progress through a sequence of logical and numbered steps. Supports horizontal and vertical layouts.

examples.title: Examples
examples.description: Stepper is flexible and can be used in different contexts to display progress.

props.steps: Array of step items to display
props.onStepClick: Callback when a step is clicked (requires clickableSteps)
props.title: Step title text
props.error: Mark step as having an error

dos.text: Use for multi-step processes like checkouts, forms, or wizards
dos.textAr: استخدم للعمليات متعددة الخطوات مثل الدفع والنماذج والمعالجات

dos.text: Show completion state clearly with checkmarks
dos.textAr: أظهر حالة الإكمال بوضوح مع علامات الصح

dos.text: Allow going back to previous steps when possible
dos.textAr: اسمح بالعودة للخطوات السابقة عند الإمكان

dos.text: Keep step titles concise and descriptive
dos.textAr: اجعل عناوين الخطوات موجزة ووصفية

dos.text: Use vertical orientation for narrow spaces or many steps
dos.textAr: استخدم الاتجاه العمودي للمساحات الضيقة أو الخطوات الكثيرة

donts.text: Don't use for unrelated content (use tabs instead)
donts.textAr: لا تستخدم للمحتوى غير المترابط (استخدم التبويبات بدلاً منه)

donts.text: Don't have too many steps (ideally 3-5)
donts.textAr: لا تضع الكثير من الخطوات (3-5 مثالياً)

donts.text: Don't skip steps without user confirmation
donts.textAr: لا تتخطى الخطوات بدون تأكيد المستخدم

donts.text: Don't use vague step titles
donts.textAr: لا تستخدم عناوين خطوات غامضة

paginationPage.title: Pagination
paginationPage.description: Pagination enables navigation between pages of content. Supports records count display, items per page selector, and multiple layout variants.

examples.title: Examples
examples.description: Pagination is flexible and can be used in different contexts.

props.totalRecords: Total number of records/items (for records info display)
props.itemsPerPageOptions: Available options for items per page dropdown
props.onItemsPerPageChange: Callback when items per page changes
props.itemsPerPageLabel: Label for items per page dropdown
props.variant: Layout variant - numbers shows page buttons, compact shows page info
props.buttonStyle: Visual style - filled has solid background, outlined has border only
props.siblingCount: Number of sibling pages to show on each side of current
props.showFirstLast: Always show first and last page

dos.text: Show current page clearly with visual distinction
dos.textAr: أظهر الصفحة الحالية بوضوح مع تمييز بصري

dos.text: Use compact variant for mobile or limited space
dos.textAr: استخدم النوع المضغوط للجوال أو المساحات المحدودة

dos.text: Show total page count for user orientation
dos.textAr: أظهر إجمالي عدد الصفحات لتوجيه المستخدم

dos.text: Disable navigation buttons at boundaries
dos.textAr: عطّل أزرار التنقل عند الحدود

dos.text: Use ellipsis to indicate skipped pages
dos.textAr: استخدم علامات الحذف للإشارة إلى الصفحات المتخطاة

donts.text: Don't show too many page numbers at once
donts.textAr: لا تظهر الكثير من أرقام الصفحات في وقت واحد

donts.text: Don't use for infinite scroll content
donts.textAr: لا تستخدم للمحتوى اللانهائي

donts.text: Don't hide the current page indicator
donts.textAr: لا تخفِ مؤشر الصفحة الحالية

donts.text: Don't use pagination for very few items
donts.textAr: لا تستخدم الترقيم لعناصر قليلة جدًا

snackbarPage.title: Snackbar
snackbarPage.description: Snackbars provide brief messages at the bottom of the screen. Supports multiple status variants, optional icons, and action buttons.

examples.title: Examples
examples.description: Snackbars are flexible and can be used in different contexts.

props.status: Status determines the background color and default icon
props.showLeadingIcon: Whether to show the leading status icon
props.icon: Custom icon to override the default status icon
props.onAction: Callback when action button is clicked
props.dismissible: Whether the snackbar can be dismissed
props.onDismiss: Callback when dismiss button is clicked

dos.text: Auto-dismiss after a few seconds for non-critical messages
dos.textAr: إغلاق تلقائي بعد ثوانٍ للرسائل غير الحرجة

dos.text: Include an undo action for destructive operations
dos.textAr: تضمين إجراء التراجع للعمليات التدميرية

dos.text: Keep messages brief and actionable
dos.textAr: اجعل الرسائل موجزة وقابلة للتنفيذ

dos.text: Use appropriate status colors for context
dos.textAr: استخدم ألوان الحالة المناسبة للسياق

donts.text: Don't stack multiple snackbars at once
donts.textAr: لا تكدس عدة إشعارات في وقت واحد

donts.text: Don't use for critical errors requiring user action
donts.textAr: لا تستخدم للأخطاء الحرجة التي تتطلب إجراء المستخدم

donts.text: Don't include lengthy text or multiple paragraphs
donts.textAr: لا تضمن نصوصاً طويلة أو فقرات متعددة

messagePage.title: Message
messagePage.description: Messages display empty states, informational content, or contextual feedback with artwork, title, and description.

examples.title: Examples
examples.description: Message is flexible and can be used for empty states, success confirmations, and informational content.

props.title: Main heading text
props.artworkSrc: Image URL for illustration/image artwork types
props.icon: Custom icon for icon artwork type

dos.text: Use for empty states in lists, tables, or search results
dos.textAr: استخدم للحالات الفارغة في القوائم والجداول ونتائج البحث

dos.text: Include a clear call-to-action when appropriate
dos.textAr: قم بتضمين دعوة واضحة للعمل عند الاقتضاء

dos.text: Use illustrations that match the context and brand
dos.textAr: استخدم الرسوم التوضيحية التي تتوافق مع السياق والعلامة التجارية

dos.text: Keep messages concise and helpful
dos.textAr: اجعل الرسائل موجزة ومفيدة

donts.text: Don't use for error states that require user action
donts.textAr: لا تستخدم لحالات الخطأ التي تتطلب إجراء المستخدم

donts.text: Don't overload with too much text
donts.textAr: لا تفرط في استخدام النص

donts.text: Don't use generic illustrations that don't match context
donts.textAr: لا تستخدم رسومات توضيحية عامة لا تتطابق مع السياق

sideMenuPage.title: Side Menu
sideMenuPage.description: Vertical navigation component for desktop applications. Supports expanded and collapsed states with sections, badges, and logout functionality.

props.expanded: Controls expanded (full width) or collapsed (icon only) state
props.onToggle: Callback when toggle button is clicked
props.label: Menu item label text
props.hasSubmenu: Whether item has a submenu (shows chevron)
props.sectionTitle: Optional section title (shown in expanded mode only)

dos.collapse: Collapse to icons on smaller screens

donts.mobile: Don't show on mobile (use drawer instead)
